message:
🐛 Fix remaining cache compliance test failures (0 fail, 22 warn) (#1143)

- Add nightly_e2e_status to DEMO_DATA_CARDS set so CardWrapper shows
  demo badge immediately via prop (card falls back to demo when no
  GitHub token)
- Add 500ms stabilization wait after waitForCardsToLoad in cold load
  phase — gives lazy (code-split) StackContext components time to mount
  and report isDemoData via useReportCardDataState before snapshot

Results: 152 pass, 0 fail, 22 warn (was 147/1/26)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
